name: test_using_a_case_expression_in_a_with_positive_case
description: /Users/dpp/*project/newdb/cyphertck/gdm-tck/features/0-original/neo4j/CaseExpression.feature: [6] Using a CASE expression in a WITH, positive case
descriptionHtml: /Users/dpp/*project/newdb/cyphertck/gdm-tck/features/0-original/neo4j/CaseExpression.feature: [6] Using a CASE expression in a WITH, positive case
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected results but query failed: Query execution failed: {code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.SyntaxError} {message: Invalid statement syntax: cypher:  --> 3:34
  |
3 |        WHEN id(n) >= 0 THEN (n)-->()
  |                                  ^---
  |
  = expected primary}
Cypher: MATCH (n)
WITH CASE
       WHEN id(n) >= 0 THEN (n)-->()
       ELSE 42
     END AS p, count(n) AS c
RETURN p, c
